stemHtml: Which style of sunglasses is most appropriate for pilots?

options.a: Non-polarized sunglasses to filter UV radiations and prevent cataracts.
options.b: Non-polarized sunglasses to filter 50% of UV radiations and prevent damage to the retina and presbycusis (age-related hearing loss).
options.c: Polarized sunglasses to reduce glare and enhance visibility.
options.d: Polarized sunglasses to protect against UV radiations and prevent age-related vision impairments.
